_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Ability DG-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-004 (AI, cosine: 0.533), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.352). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. NICE-only terms [determine, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.853, R=0.845). Balanced P/R — the 3-word NICE element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Determine system stakeholders" and "Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who genera" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 > STS 0.352 (gap +0.228). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholders] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. NICE-only: [determine, system]. WIDAI-only: [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective].
